BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-SamsungXR
BundleInfo.Author: André Michaelis
BundleInfo.Synopsis: 3D cursor, selection, and hover labels for Samsung Odyssey 3D displays
BundleInfo.Description:
Adds interactive 3D features for autostereo displays using the vrto3d SteamVR driver (Samsung Odyssey G90XF/G90XH and similar lenticular displays with eye tracking).
Features: - 3D cursor at correct stereo depth (5 styles: sphere, crosshair, diamond, arrow, pointer) - 3D selection rectangle for region-based selection - 3D hover labels for atoms, residues, and bonds - Press C to cycle cursor styles
Requires ChimeraX daily build 2026-02-27 or newer (vrto3d base support).
